creator: devnull@apt322.org
text:
Hi,

After upgrade poudriere-devel to 3.4.99.20241212 version, when I see some build on WebUI, I got the error: "Unknown data type "inspected". Try flushing cache."
See the error: https://poudriere.apt322.org/build.html?mastername=jpoudriere-HEAD&build=2024-12-21_21h21m35s

Also, after 3.4.99.20241212 upgrade, all ignored packages (due to shlib check) now show as remaining packages.
This way, the package build percentage on WebUI never reaches 100%.
On previous 3.4.99.20240811 version, the percentage bar showed the built packages in green bar and the ignored packages in orange bar, reaching 100% bar.
Now it looks like the build hung, never reaching 100%.

Please see https://poudriere.apt322.org/jail.html?mastername=jpoudriere-HEAD
where the last 3 builds since 2024-12-20_22h32m16s (using 3.4.99.20241212 version), you can see the "inspected" error and the "remaining" packages, instead of "ignored packages".

Previous builds everything fine.

Thanks!
